title: GitHub webhook validation failed during workflow test
symptom: When testing a workflow that interacts with GitHub, the user encounters a 'Validation Failed' error. This occurs intermittently without any changes made to the workflow.
applies_when: Using GitHub webhooks in the workflow
not_this_if: Error occurs without using GitHub webhooks
root_cause: The error occurs because n8n attempts to create a new webhook request to the GitHub repository, but a previous request with the same URL already exists. This conflict leads to the validation failure during the workflow test.
fix_steps: Navigate to the GitHub repository settings
agent_instruction: Delete existing webhook URLs in the GitHub repository settings before testing the workflow again.
